	/* nova_ext_sim_central:news_create v1 START - managed block, do not edit by hand */
	public function create_news_item($data = '')
	{
		$result = parent::create_news_item($data);

		if ($result > 0 && class_exists('nova_ext_sim_central\\Webhooks')) {
			$newId = $this->db->insert_id();
			if ($newId) {
				\nova_ext_sim_central\Webhooks::onNewsChanged($newId, $data, null);
			}
		}

		return $result;
	}
	/* nova_ext_sim_central:news_create END */
